step_by_step_thinking:
I agree that gamma rays exhibit the highest penetration capability because they consist of highly energetic photons capable of passing through dense materials including many parts of the body without significant attenuation. This makes them ideal for applications requiring deep-tissue imaging or treatment where minimal absorption by intervening matter is crucial. 

Answer Choice: C.
